name: Candy Bar/Breakfast Bar
recipeIngredient: 1 package Alba or Weight Watchers Chocolate Drink
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Place mixture on plastic wrap.
3. Shape into a log.
4. Freeze the log.
5. Cut into slices.
Weight Watchers exchanges: 1 milk, 1 fruit, 1 bread, 1 protein, 1 fat.
